validation: The page loads the supplied Pixels Medium TTF and visibly reports when it falls back to the embedded outline atlas. Preserving grid corners, collapsing repeated bridge points, and retaining Mesh-to-Curve provenance keeps the authored, subdivide=1, and subdivide=0 sweeps topology-exact. Blender's extracted active-relative object matrix and its 0.01 Mesh-to-Curve base width reduce all three bounds deltas to at most 0.0001 units after 334 authored Blur Attribute passes. The authored result remains 35,886 / 33,474, subdivide=1 is 17,865 / 16,220, and subdivide=0 is 3,392 / 3,166. Browser authored mode reconstructs the flat.nodes col/power emission and grey ui normal-band materials. Aligned Blender/WebGL captures reach 0.961441 silhouette IoU, 0.061763 RGB MAE, and 0.987130 macro luminance correlation.
